headline: NexPoint Residential Trust Inc. (NXRT) Q1 FFO and Revenues Beat Estimates
summary: NexPoint Residential Trust Inc. (NXRT) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of +20.35% and +0.81%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
